info.title: codecompress
info.description:
CodeCompress CLI — Compressed, symbol-level code access. Saves 80-90% tokens vs reading raw files.
Recommended Workflow:
1. index        Build/update the symbol database (run first)
2. outline      Get a compressed codebase overview
3. search       Find symbols using FTS5 full-text search
4. get-symbol   Retrieve exact source code by name

commands.name: agent-instructions
commands.description: Output a block of text optimized for pasting into CLAUDE.md, system prompts, or agent configuration files. Tells AI agents how to use the CodeCompress CLI for code discovery.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: assemble
commands.description: Assemble relevant code context within a token budget. Combines search + source retrieval + file overview in one call. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --query
options.description: Task description or search terms (e.g., 'authentication middleware')

options.name: --active-file
options.description: Relative path to the file you're editing — gets highest priority

options.name: --budget
options.description: Maximum token budget (1000-200000, default 40000). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 40000]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: changes
commands.description: Show what changed since a named snapshot: new, modified, and deleted files. Use snapshot to set a baseline first. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --label
options.description: Snapshot label to compare against

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: deps
commands.description: Show the import/require dependency graph. Shows which files depend on which others. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --file
options.description: Start from a specific file (relative path)

options.name: --direction
options.description: Traversal direction. Allowed values: 'dependencies' (outgoing), 'dependents' (incoming), 'both' (default). Other values rejected. [default: both]

options.name: --depth
options.description: Maximum traversal depth (1-50, default 3). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 3]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: expand-symbol
commands.description: Retrieve only a nested symbol's body without loading the parent class — saves ~60% tokens. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --name
options.description: Symbol name — accepts qualified 'Parent:Child' (e.g., MyClass:MyMethod) or unqualified names. Unqualified names are resolved automatically.

options.name: --context
options.description: Include 3 lines of context before and after the symbol

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: file-tree
commands.description: Show an annotated directory tree with file counts. Does NOT require index — reads the filesystem directly.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --depth
options.description: Maximum directory depth (1-20, default 5). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 5]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: find-references
commands.description: Find all locations where a symbol is referenced across the codebase. Faster than grep. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --name
options.description: Symbol name to search for references (e.g., 'ISymbolStore')

options.name: --path-filter
options.description: Filter results to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: get-module-api
commands.description: Get the full public API surface of a single file — symbols, signatures, and dependencies. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --module
options.description: Relative path to the module file (e.g., src/Core/Foo.cs). Forward slashes only.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: get-symbol
commands.description: Retrieve the full source code of a specific symbol by name. Loads only the symbol, not the whole file — saves 80%+ tokens. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --name
options.description: Symbol name — accepts qualified 'Parent:Child' (e.g., CombatService:ProcessAttack) or unqualified names. Unqualified names are resolved automatically.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: get-symbols
commands.description: Batch retrieve source code for multiple symbols in one call. More efficient than repeated get-symbol. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --names
options.description: Comma-separated list of qualified symbol names (max 50). Same format as get-symbol.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: index
commands.description: Index a project to build a searchable symbol database. Must be run before any query commands. Re-running performs an incremental update — only changed files are re-parsed.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --language
options.description: Filter to a specific language (e.g., luau, csharp)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: invalidate-cache
commands.description: Delete the entire index for a project, forcing a full re-index on the next index command.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: outline
commands.description: Show a compressed project outline with symbol signatures. Far more efficient than reading files individually. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --group-by
options.description: Grouping strategy. Allowed values: 'file' (default), 'kind', 'directory'. Other values rejected. [default: file]

options.name: --include-private
options.description: Include private/local symbols

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: Limit directory traversal depth (null for unlimited)

options.name: --path-filter
options.description: Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')

options.name: --max-symbols
options.description: Maximum symbols to return (1-5000, default 500). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 500]

options.name: --offset
options.description: Number of symbols to skip for pagination [default: 0]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: project-deps
commands.description: Show inter-project dependency relationships in a .NET solution. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --filter
options.description: Filter to projects whose name contains this string (case-insensitive)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search the symbol index using FTS5 full-text search. Faster and more precise than grep. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --query
options.description: FTS5 search query (supports AND, OR, NOT, prefix*, *contains*)

options.name: --kind
options.description: Filter by symbol kind (function, method, class, record, enum, type, interface, export, constant, module)

options.name: --path-filter
options.description: Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: search-text
commands.description: Search raw file contents using FTS5 full-text search. Use for string literals, comments, or non-symbol patterns. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --query
options.description: FTS5 search query for raw file contents

options.name: --glob
options.description: File pattern filter (e.g., *.cs, src/services/*.lua)

options.name: --path-filter
options.description: Filter to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/')

options.name: --limit
options.description: Maximum results to return (1-100, default 20). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 20]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: snapshot
commands.description: Create a named snapshot of the current index state. Use before making changes, then run 'changes' to see what changed. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --label
options.description: Human-readable label (auto-generated if omitted)

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format

commands.name: topic-outline
commands.description: Search for symbols related to a topic and return results in outline format. Requires index.

options.name: --path
options.description: Absolute path to the project root directory

options.name: --topic
options.description: Topic or keyword to search for (e.g., 'authentication', 'database')

options.name: --path-filter
options.description: Filter results to files under this directory (e.g., 'src/Core/')

options.name: --max-results
options.description: Maximum symbols to return (1-200, default 50). Values outside range are clamped. [default: 50]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --json
options.description: Output as JSON instead of human-readable format
